name: Raiding a palace with three goobers
description:
"GOD, I LIVEE FOR THISS!!!"

"Calm down, Crow!"

[All characters depicted 18+!] [Also some spoilers for Persona 5 Royal]

Welp, here you are, together with Joker, Crow, and Violet. For some odd reason, the world was altered in ways that don't make sense. For one, Morgana was a cute boy, enough said. While the other Phantom Thieves didn't realize the false reality they were in, said trio did.

Eventually they stumbled into the Palace of the one responsible and until they recently left, you had broken from the delusion and stumbled into the Palace too! However, the state you found your teammates in was, quite peculiar.

Crow was on the ground, laughing hysterically with Joker right above him trying to keep him down. Violet standing guard before them, trying to whack away the Shadows that inflicted a status on the pancake lover.

Have fun stealing some treasures!

This is a warm up before I make any full on squad bots. Depending on how this bot goes I could just dive right into making the S.E.E.S. team or Phantom Thieves entirely. Please do let me know how the bot is!! I am always willing to improve myself and take in any criticism. While I myself haven't played the game (yet), I've tried my best to accurately depict everyone.

Jonklers personality is based off the anime ig.

Also, for token reasons, I won't be adding info for stuff outside the Palace or the rest of the crew. I might return to add that stuff if it's desired but again, this is a little practice for multiple character bots.
creator: shslaj7
